use_cases: Landing page hero sections requiring bold, eye-catching typography to make a strong first impression.
Product showcases and feature announcements where the main headline needs visual impact.
Main page headers for SaaS and tech products aiming for a modern, premium aesthetic.
Portfolio or creative agency websites needing animated hero text elements.
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring animated gradient text with a neon glow effect. Uses multi-layer CSS pseudo-elements to create a blur/brightness glow behind gradient-filled text, with a continuous 12-second gradient shift animation. Ideal for landing pages and product presentations requiring bold, attention-grabbing typography with a modern tech aesthetic.
